title: Dolichopentas longiflora
taxonomy: Dolichopentas longiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Pedaliaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is also known as the 'long-flowered beauty'. The plant is a member of the genus Dolichopentas, which is a group of plants within the Pedaliaceae family. Dolichopentas longiflora is further classified into the kingdom Plantae, the division Magnoliophyta, and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification places the plant within the broader group of flowering plants.
